src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence and javax.validation imports with jakarta equivalents to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Replace the combined @Data annotation with explicit @Getter and @Setter annotations, likely to avoid generating equals/hashCode methods for an entity.
Remove the @EqualsAndHashCode annotation to prevent Lombok from generating equals and hashCode methods, which is a best practice for JPA entities.
Add a new 'permissions' field to the GroupRole entity to store permission data.
Replace javax.persistence and javax.validation imports with jakarta equivalents to support Jakarta EE 9+ required by Spring Boot 3.
Remove Hibernate-specific GenericGenerator annotation in favor of standard JPA @GeneratedValue, likely relying on database default or provider-specific UUID generation.
Explicitly mark the ID column as non-updatable and non-nullable in the JPA mapping.
Rename the JPA entity table from 'user' to 'app_user' to avoid SQL reserved keyword conflicts.
Replace @Data and @EqualsAndHashCode with explicit @Builder, @Getter, and @Setter annotations for more granular control over generated methods.
Change the ManyToMany cascade type from ALL to MERGE to prevent unintended deletion or persistence of associated roles.
Replace explicit JPQL query for username lookup with Spring Data JPA derived method name.
Replace explicit JPQL query for username and enabled status lookup with Spring Data JPA derived method name.
Remove unused repository method for finding user by email.
Remove unused repository method for finding active user by email.
Remove unused imports related to removed query methods.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.human_impl: Removed imports for Modifying, Query, Param, and List

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Added import for GroupRole entity to support new method signatures.
Renamed parameter from usernameValue to username for clarity.
Added save method to persist user data.
Added getUsers method to retrieve all users.
Added getById method to retrieve user by ID.
Added getGroupRoleByCode method to retrieve group role by code.
Removed dependency on Apache Commons Lang3 as string manipulation is no longer used.
Removed unused import for java.time.Instant.
Added import for GroupRole entity to support new repository usage.
Added import for GroupRoleRepository to enable role lookups.
Added import for java.util.UUID to support ID parsing.
Added GroupRoleRepository field to the service class.
Updated constructor to inject GroupRoleRepository alongside UserRepository.
Simplified getUserByUsername by removing manual trimming and email/username branching, delegating to a specific repository method.
Added getById method to retrieve a user by their UUID string.
Added getGroupRoleByCode method to retrieve a group role by its code.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.human_impl: public Optional<GroupRole> getGroupRoleByCode(String code) { return groupRoleRepository.findByCode(code); }

src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.general_idea: Added getUsers method to retrieve all users.
Added save method to persist a user entity.
src/main/java/com/boottech/springshirojw.human_impl: public User save(User user) { return userRepository.save(user); }

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.2 to 3.5.9 to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace.
Update the target Java version property from 11 to 21.
Define a property for the Apache Shiro version to manage dependency versions centrally.
Add Spring Boot Starter Data JPA dependency for database access.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency for bean validation.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver dependency for database connectivity.
Remove explicit dependency on Apache Commons Lang3, likely relying on transitive dependencies or removing usage.
Replace the Shiro Spring Boot Starter with explicit shiro-core and shiro-spring dependencies to avoid auto-configuration conflicts in Spring Boot 3.
Add explicit shiro-spring dependency to integrate Shiro with Spring without the starter.
Add JJWT API dependency for JWT token handling.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT processing.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization/deserialization of JWT claims.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Added the Spring Boot application name property for better identification in logs and actuator endpoints.
Removed the explicit Hibernate dialect configuration, relying on Spring Boot's auto-detection which is standard in modern versions.
Changed Hibernate DDL auto strategy from create-drop to update to preserve data between restarts during development.
Renamed the datasource driver class property to the standard Spring Boot 2.x/3.x kebab-case format.
Updated the database URL to point to a specific database name 'shirodb'.
Updated the database username and password credentials.
